name: Mocha-Nut Butterballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, cream together the butter, sugar, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the instant coffee granules, cocoa powder, and flour until blended.
3. Add the chopped nuts and mix with your hands until well combined.
4. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls and place them about an inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 325°F for 15 minutes or until the cookies crack slightly.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool on wire racks.
7. Roll in powdered sugar. Store airtight.
